writing.task1:
Dear Billing Team, I was charged twice for my monthly gym membership after switching cards, once on  my old card and once on my new card. Please refund the duplicate charge to the original payment method and confirm that auto-pay is now working correctly with my new card
Thank you
writing.task2: I agree that private car should be restricted in city centres during weekday daylight hours because it would reduce traffic congestion and air pollution, making the city safer and healthier for pedestrian and cyclist. For example, London’s congestion charge zone has lowered car use and encouraged more people to take public transport. A counter point is that some people may find it inconvenient, especially those who need to drive for work, but improved public transport can help meet most travel need
writing.task3: Weekend sales were higher across all categories, with the biggest jump in pastries (150 on ưeekday vs 230 on weekend), followed by coffee (260 - 330) and sandwiches (180 - 210). Coffee remained the top seller overall, while pastries saw the sharpest weekend rise. Since demand increases most on weekends, especially for coffee and pastries, the café could schedule extra staff or bake more pastries in advance to handle the rush smoothly
